# Copilot Instructions

## Project

A front-end web CV/portfolio targeting a fintech company. Do not mention or reference the specific company anywhere in the codebase, documentation, or commits — refer to it only as "a fintech company" if needed.

## Documentation & Transparency

All plans, specs, and architectural decisions must be committed to the repository. This project is intentionally built with AI assistance as a demonstration — keep documentation thorough and visible in git.

> **Note:** Update this file once the stack is chosen and the project structure is established. Add build/test/lint commands, architecture overview, and key conventions at that point.
